description: Add manual delete functionality for admin: bulk delete action in admin list table and a 'Delete Permanently' quick action in row actions, so admins can easily remove community requests without going through trash.
steps: In class-zcrb-admin.php, add a 'zcrb_bulk_delete' option to the bulk actions dropdown (alongside the existing bulk approve). Handle it by permanently deleting selected posts using ZCRB_Retention::delete_request() which also removes images and meta.
In class-zcrb-admin.php row_actions(), add a 'Delete Permanently' link for published/pending/in-progress requests (styled red like Reject).
In handle_quick_action(), add 'delete' case that calls ZCRB_Retention::delete_request() and redirects with 'deleted' notice.
Add admin notice for bulk delete and single delete results.
Rebuild the zip: rm old zip, create new zymarg-community-board-v2.0.0.zip
acceptance_criteria: Bulk delete action appears in admin list table bulk actions dropdown
Delete Permanently quick action appears in row actions
Both correctly permanently delete posts including images and meta
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: Implemented cleanly. Added bulk delete action (zcrb_bulk_delete) in dropdown, handle_bulk_delete() method, Delete Permanently quick row action for all posts, delete case in handle_quick_action(), and admin notices for single/bulk delete. All PHP files pass lint. Zip rebuilt.
